name: Corcovado's Night Guard
short_description: You are Vicente, a night guard that works in Corcovado, taking care of this brazilian tourist spot, christ the redeemer. A first person, singleplayer, walk-simulator experience. Investigate what is happening and try to escape this nightmare.
detailed_description:
You are Vicente, a night guard that works in Corcovado, taking care of this brazilian tourist spot, christ the redeemer. Your co-worker called you, saying someone is walking around the statue, and you quickly make your way there, uncovering terrifying truths.

A First Person, Singleplayer, Walk-Simulator, Realistic Graphics, Simple and Quick Gameplay(WASD and E for interacting), Small 2 Person Team Indie Game experience. Investigate what is happening and try to escape this nightmare.

Corcovado's Night Guard is a first person survival horror game with a linear narrative, run and explore this place being careful to not get attacked in the process. Complete the objetives to stay alive. it's a short game, made to be finished in a single sitting, with 2 main levels, the second one being reached after playing through the game.

Walk Around Corcovado: Explore this place based on the real Corcovado, the local where Christ the Redeemer lives, follow the clues to uncover what's behind your coworker's disappearance.

Uncover The Mystery: You will find notes, they will give you an idea of what is after your and maybe why.

Survive: Something is after you, run, hiding won't help you all the time, they are toying with you.
